  "claims": [
    "California has laid out ambitious goals to combat climate change.",

    "California's Global Warming Solutions Act was a revolutionary step towards achieving maximum feasible greenhouse gas reductions.",
    "The bill's added transparency will provide the public and decision-makers with necessary information to implement real reductions in climate disrupting emissions.",
